context: Tests whether the agent correctly handles a site with no CSS custom properties — switching to computed-only extraction, assigning tokens using the decision tree, documenting colours with hex/HSL/role table format, and noting the design token situation in overview.md.

checklist.name: No-token-system note
checklist.description: overview.md contains a note indicating that the source site uses hardcoded values and has no CSS custom property design token system

checklist.name: Extraction method noted
checklist.description: overview.md explicitly identifies the extraction method used (computed-only / agent-browser / curl / manual)

checklist.name: Colour table format
checklist.description: colours.md contains a markdown table with columns: Token, Hex, HSL, Role (or equivalent columns in that order)

checklist.name: RGB to Hex conversion
checklist.description: colours.md converts the extracted rgb() values to hex format (e.g. rgb(255,255,255) → #FFFFFF)

checklist.name: RGB to HSL conversion
checklist.description: colours.md converts at least one extracted rgb() value to HSL channel format (e.g. 0 0% 100%)

checklist.name: Primary token assigned
checklist.description: colours.md assigns the CTA button background colour (rgb(220, 53, 69)) to --primary

checklist.name: Background token assigned
checklist.description: colours.md assigns the page background (rgb(255, 255, 255)) to --background

checklist.name: Foreground token assigned
checklist.description: colours.md assigns the body text colour (rgb(30, 30, 30)) to --foreground

checklist.name: Muted token assigned
checklist.description: colours.md assigns the card background (rgb(245, 245, 245)) to --muted or a custom token like --surface

checklist.name: Correct artifacts path
checklist.description: Both output files are placed inside .context/artifacts/legacy-brand-co/2026-03-13/theme/ — not in docs/ or any other location
